# Project Roadmap

This document outlines the planned features and improvements for the Binance Streaming Project.

## 🎯 Vision

Create a robust, scalable, and user-friendly real-time cryptocurrency data streaming platform that provides accurate market insights and supports various trading strategies.

## 🗓️ Timeline

### Q4 2024 (Current)
- [x] Core streaming pipeline
- [x] Basic aggregation and storage
- [x] Grafana visualization
- [x] Docker containerization
- [x] Documentation and setup guides

### Q1 2025
- [ ] Enhanced error handling and recovery
- [ ] Performance optimizations
- [ ] Additional cryptocurrency symbols
- [ ] Advanced anomaly detection
- [ ] Real-time alerting system

### Q2 2025
- [ ] Machine learning integration
- [ ] REST API for data access
- [ ] WebSocket API for real-time streaming
- [ ] Advanced Grafana dashboards
- [ ] Horizontal scaling capabilities

### Q3 2025
- [ ] Multi-exchange support
- [ ] Advanced analytics and insights
- [ ] Custom aggregation windows
- [ ] Data export functionality
- [ ] Backup and recovery procedures

### Q4 2025
- [ ] Cloud deployment options
- [ ] Enterprise features
- [ ] Advanced security features
- [ ] Performance monitoring
- [ ] Community marketplace

## 🚀 Planned Features

### Core Platform

#### Data Sources
- [ ] **Additional Exchanges**
  - Binance Futures
  - Coinbase Pro
  - Kraken
  - Bitfinex
  - Custom exchange connectors

- [ ] **Data Types**
  - Order book data
  - Trade history
  - Market depth
  - Funding rates
  - Open interest

#### Processing Engine
- [ ] **Advanced Aggregations**
  - Custom time windows
  - Multiple aggregation functions
  - Real-time calculations
  - Historical data processing

- [ ] **Machine Learning**
  - Price prediction models
  - Anomaly detection algorithms
  - Pattern recognition
  - Sentiment analysis

#### Storage & Database
- [ ] **Database Options**
  - TimescaleDB for time-series data
  - ClickHouse for analytics
  - Redis for caching
  - Elasticsearch for search

- [ ] **Data Management**
  - Data retention policies
  - Compression algorithms
  - Backup strategies
  - Data migration tools

### User Interface

#### Web Dashboard
- [ ] **Real-time Dashboard**
  - Live price charts
  - Market overview
  - System status
  - Performance metrics

- [ ] **Analytics Interface**
  - Custom queries
  - Data visualization
  - Report generation
  - Export functionality

#### APIs
- [ ] **REST API**
  - Data access endpoints
  - Authentication system
  - Rate limiting
  - API documentation

- [ ] **WebSocket API**
  - Real-time data streaming
  - Custom subscriptions
  - Connection management
  - Error handling

### Infrastructure

#### Scalability
- [ ] **Horizontal Scaling**
  - Kubernetes deployment
  - Load balancing
  - Auto-scaling
  - Service mesh

- [ ] **Performance**
  - Caching layers
  - Database optimization
  - Network optimization
  - Resource monitoring

#### Security
- [ ] **Authentication**
  - OAuth integration
  - API key management
  - Role-based access
  - Audit logging

- [ ] **Data Protection**
  - Encryption at rest
  - Encryption in transit
  - Data anonymization
  - Compliance features

### Monitoring & Observability

#### System Monitoring
- [ ] **Metrics Collection**
  - Prometheus integration
  - Custom metrics
  - Performance tracking
  - Resource utilization

- [ ] **Logging**
  - Structured logging
  - Log aggregation
  - Error tracking
  - Audit trails

#### Alerting
- [ ] **Real-time Alerts**
  - Price movement alerts
  - System health alerts
  - Performance alerts
  - Custom notifications

- [ ] **Notification Channels**
  - Email notifications
  - Slack integration
  - Webhook support
  - Mobile push notifications

### Performance
